MODULE: cosmos.incidents.opsgenie_integration
FILE: cosmos/incidents/opsgenie_integration.py (638 lines)
CATEGORY: incidents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos OpsGenie Integration

"Good news, everyone! The alerts are so loud, even Nibbler woke up!"

OpsGenie integration for incident management.

CLASSES:
- OpsGenieAlert: OpsGenie alert representation.
- OpsGenieIntegration: OpsGenie integration for alert and incident management.

Features:
